house of the assumed time of birth.
The sex of the child can be determined by taking the chart
of germination time. Again we have to construct a chart for
the time arrived at. Here are different views. One view takes
the even signs to be female and the odd signs male. But this is
debatable. Taurus may be feminine. But what about Libra? lf
Mesha is masculine, can Scorpio be feminine? The same ap
plies to Sagittarius and Pisces - odd and even signs. Do
Saturn and Mercury ruling four signs give female birth? This
is not acceptable. The owner is important. Mercury can give

Pre-Natal Epoch 85
either male or female births. Saturn owning Aquarius can
give rise to male births.
The decanate (Drekkana) and navamsa ofthe birth chart
can give an indication of the sex of the native. According to
one ancient theory the first and third decanates of an odd sign
are male, and those for an even sign are female. But this
cannot hold good.
